name: Brand Guard
description: Before writing public-facing content, enforce brand voice, canon, and entity rules from the CEO brand bible.

then.prompt: Before writing this content, verify: 1) Public brand is MysterMyself / Scott-King Coast (NOT MysteryCartel on public UI). 2) No em dashes in copy. 3) No corporate words — use 5th grade reading level, short sentences. 4) No fake social links (use /follow-the-coast or Coming Soon). 5) Trading content uses Chef Lingo from .kiro/steering/ceo-brand-bible.md. 6) Characters are from the locked canon list only. 7) Entity names match: Breaded Or Not?! LLC, Knighten Route Transportation LLC, Scott-King IP LLC. 8) No new districts or characters invented. If all checks pass, proceed.
